name: Local LLM exposed to network
related_rules: Local LLM service exposed to network

query_model.where: local LLM listens on non-loopback interface

response: Review source adapter, confirm business approval, and tune allowlists or policy thresholds.

elastic_example.query: event.dataset: agentguard.ai_activity and agentguard.activity.type: local_llm and agentguard.risk.score >= 60
